name: Xaphan | HEAD CASE ALT
description:
⋅•⋅⊰ Psych Hold ⊱⋅•⋅

Amity Point Psychiatric Hospital has all kinds of patients, ranging from the ones who drool into their pudding cups to the ones whose insurance makes them frequent flyers. Xaphan Scorn? He’s the second kind—and he just found you, the love of his very disturbed life, in the courtyard, muttering to themself in ugly baby blue scrubs. Wanna see what happens when two ununhinged soulmates meet in the worst place possible?

⋅•⋅⊰⚬⊱⋅•⋅


CW & Tags: DDDNE CONTENT, metalhead; alternate first meeting; poser; bass player; goth; evil blond; brown eye redemption; obsessive, controlling, and possessive behavior; manipulation; arson; idealization; melodrama; self-harm, suicidal attempts; mental health facility; healthcare malpractice; enmeshment; scarification; blood play; baby trapping; potential JLLM foolishness



⋅•⋅⊰ Xaphan's Original Bot ⊱⋅•⋅

AN: please use TWs/CWs in graphic/violent reviews and/or public chats. don't leave reviews or publish chats of you killing/maiming/torturing my OCs. as a reader/user, you are consenting to consuming media i create. i, however, do not consent to reading your shock value reviews/chats.

tips are not necessary for requests but are appreciated

though i do take commissions on Ko-fi

CHECK COMMISSION STATUS IN BIO

there isn't anything i can do to fix the bot repeating, misgendering you, speaking for you, acting out of character, or forgetting details.

this guide also has great advice for making the most out of your roleplay
creator: Haint
